params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort by. One of: created_at, updated_at.

params.name: direction
params.description: Sort direction. One of: asc, desc.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results per page (1–100, default 30).

items.docs:
List triage actions for an organization. Results are paginated and can be sorted by created_at or updated_at.

This endpoint consumes 1 unit of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- triage:alerts-list

params.name: force
params.description: Set to true to force broad triage updates, these are triages lacking a specific alertKey or granular artifact information which may have limited introspection to see what they apply to.

items.docs:
Create or update triage actions on organization alerts. Accepts a batch of triage entries. Omit `uuid` to create a new entry; provide an existing `uuid` to update it. Use `?force=true` for broad triages that lack a specific `alertKey` or granular package information.

This endpoint consumes 1 unit of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- triage:alerts-update

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the alert triage entry to delete

items.docs:
Delete a specific triage rule by UUID.

This endpoint consumes 1 unit of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- triage:alerts-update
